name: a Vue vision does not put the React-specific namespace in the consult scope
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a dashboard built with Vue" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'exit(JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["namespaces"].include?("react") ? 1:0)' && echo vue-vision-not-react 1>&2
